resources.string:
DVR Evidence is a professional dual-camera vehicle recorder with tamper-evident evidence packaging and GPS telemetry.

IMPORTANT: Dashcam laws, windshield mounting restrictions, and audio recording consent rules vary by jurisdiction. It is your responsibility to comply with local regulations.

This setup wizard takes about 60 seconds and configures the app for reliable background operation.

DVR Evidence requires the following permissions to function:

 • Camera — dual-camera recording (road + cabin)
 • Microphone — cabin audio (optional, disabled by default)
 • Location — GPS telemetry and evidence timestamps
 • Notifications — foreground service and alert delivery

All data stays on your device. Nothing is uploaded without your explicit action.

Android battery optimisation will stop background apps to save power. This WILL interrupt recording when the screen is off.

You must exempt DVR Evidence from battery optimisation to ensure the recording service stays alive during your entire journey.

On the next screen, tap “Allow” when prompted.

On Xiaomi/HyperOS devices: also go to Settings → Apps → DVR Evidence → Battery → No restrictions.

Setup complete!

DVR Evidence is ready to record.

 • Mount your phone on the windshield with the rear camera facing the road.
 • Connect to USB power — battery-only operation will deplete in 1–2 hours under dual-camera load.
 • Tap Start Recording to begin, or leave the app — recording will survive screen-off.

Evidence packages are stored in a tamper-evident format with Ed25519 signatures and RFC 3161 trusted timestamps.
